package rulefixtures

import (
	"hash/crc64"
)

// scenario for crc64_checksum_in_loop: `crc64.Checksum(...)` inside loops.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario474Positive(chunks [][]byte) uint32 {
	var total uint32
	for _, payload := range chunks {
		total += crc64.Checksum(payload, crc64.MakeTable(crc64.ISO))
	}
	return total
}
